allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@176.119.141.98 "echo ''=== Connected ==='' && docker --version 2>/dev/null || echo ''Docker NOT installed'' && nginx -v 2>&1 || echo ''Nginx NOT installed'' && ls -la /opt/filldocs/ 2>/dev/null || echo ''/opt/filldocs NOT exists'' && docker compose ps 2>/dev/null || echo ''No containers running''")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@176.119.141.98 "echo ''=== Ports 80/443 ==='' && ss -tlnp | grep -E '':80|:443'' && echo ''=== Nginx status ==='' && systemctl is-active nginx && echo ''=== Xray/Amnezia ==='' && systemctl list-units --type=service | grep -iE ''xray|amnezia|awg'' || docker ps 2>/dev/null | grep -iE ''xray|amnezia''")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@176.119.141.98 "docker ps -a 2>/dev/null && echo ''=== All listening ports ==='' && ss -tlnp | head -30")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@176.119.141.98 "systemctl stop nginx && systemctl start docker && echo ''nginx stopped, docker started'' && ss -tlnp | grep -E '':443|:80''")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@176.119.141.98 "echo ''=== CPU ==='' && nproc && lscpu | grep ''Model name'' && echo ''=== RAM ==='' && free -h && echo ''=== Disk ==='' && df -h / && echo ''=== Docker images ==='' && docker images 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo ''=== Running containers ==='' && docker ps --format ''table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Ports}}'' 2>/dev/null")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@176.119.141.98 "echo ''=== Docker containers ==='' && docker ps -a --format ''table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Ports}}'' && echo ''=== Listening ports ==='' && ss -tlnp && echo ''=== Systemd services \(non-default\) ==='' && systemctl list-units --type=service --state=running --no-pager | grep -vE ''systemd|dbus|cron|ssh|getty|network|resolved|journal|udev|polkit|snap|unattended|multipathd|ModemManager|accounts-daemon'' && echo ''=== Websites/configs ==='' && ls /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ 2>/dev/null && echo ''=== Crontab ==='' && crontab -l 2>/dev/null || echo ''no crontab''")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 root@153.80.245.179 "nginx -t && cat /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/filldocs 2>/dev/null || cat /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default 2>/dev/null")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@153.80.245.179 "ls -la /etc/letsencrypt/live/filldocs.ru/ && openssl x509 -in /etc/letsencrypt/live/filldocs.ru/fullchain.pem -noout -dates -subject 2>&1 && ss -tlnp | grep -E ''443|80''")
